sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي الْخُضْرَاوَاتُ وَالْفَوَاكِهُ عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Povrće i voće sadrže mnogo vitamina.
sentences.translationEn: Vegetables and fruits contain many vitamins.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَأْكُلَ أَطْعِمَةً مُتَنَوِّعَةً لِنَبْقَى بِصِحَّةٍ جَيِّدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Moramo jesti raznovrsnu hranu kako bismo ostali dobrog zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: We must eat a variety of foods to stay in good health.

sentences.arabic: الطَّعَامُ الطَّبِيعِيُّ أَفْضَلُ بِكَثِيرٍ مِنَ الْوَجَبَاتِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prirodna hrana je mnogo bolja od brze hrane.
sentences.translationEn: Natural food is much better than fast food.

sentences.arabic: السُّكَّرُ الْكَثِيرُ قَدْ يَضُرُّ بِأَسْنَانِنَا وَصِحَّتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Previše šećera može naštetiti našim zubima i zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: Too much sugar can harm our teeth and health.
